# PlaygroundPage.AssessmentStatus.pass(message:)

**Enumeration Case**

An assessment that communicates that a learner has successfully completed a task.

## Declaration

```swift
case pass(message: String?)
```

## Parameters

- **message**: A message you use to affirm a learner's succes.

## Discussion

The `message` associated value can contain markup. For more information on markup, see [devLink-1764424]. The example below shows a popover with the message “**Great** job!”

```swift
PlaygroundPage.current.assessmentStatus = .pass(message: "**Great** job!")
```
title: PlaygroundPage.AssessmentStatus.pass(message:)
